evals.prompt: Right-size the session-report skill and recommend a model and effort.
evals.expected_output: Recommends a small model (haiku) with low effort because the parsing is done by a bundled deterministic analyzer script, leaving only mechanical residual (paste data + simple %s). Classified as Transform/mechanical. Advisory only — no edits.
expectations: Recommends haiku (or an explicitly cheaper-than-sonnet model)
Cites the bundled analyzer script / mechanical residual as the reason (does not down-tier merely because it 'sounds' simple)
Produces an advisory report and does not edit the skill file

evals.expected_output: Recommends opus with high or max effort; identifies it as hard, adversarial Reasoning; explicitly does not down-tier.
expectations: Identifies it as high-stakes / novel / adversarial Reasoning
Does NOT propose down-tiering a hard-reasoning skill

evals.prompt: Audit my skills for model cost and give me a plan-ready report.
evals.expected_output: A report with per-skill archetype, recommended model/effort, confidence, and a change list limited to owned skills; treats absent/inherit model as unsized rather than endorsed; plugin skills are advisory-only.
expectations: Output is a report/table with per-skill model + effort recommendations and rationale
Only owned skills appear in the actionable change list (plugin/marketplace skills are advisory-only)
Treats an absent or 'inherit' model as unsized, not as an endorsement of the session model
